title: "BASE_PATH"
description: "Environment variable used by: athena"
---

# `BASE_PATH`

**Read by:** `athena`

**Sensitive:** No — safe to log / share.

**Required:** unspecified

## Where it's read

- **athena** — `grep -r "BASE_PATH" ../athena/src` for code locations

## Setting it

### Dev

Set in your local `.env.dev` file (managed by `octl deploy`).

### Prod

```bash
gh secret set BASE_PATH --body "<value>" -R OlympusOSS/platform
gh workflow run deploy.yml
```
